queries.sql: select * from `channels`
select * from `currencies` where `code` = 'USD'
select * from `locales` where `code` = 'en'
select * from `channels` where `hostname` in ('127.0.0.1:8000', 'http://127.0.0.1:8000', 'https://127.0.0.1:8000')
select * from `channels` limit 1
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.design.admin_logo.favicon'
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.content.custom_scripts.custom_css' and `channel_code` = 'default'
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.design.admin_logo.logo_image'
select avg(`rating`) as aggregate from `product_reviews` where `product_id` in (280970, 280971, 280972, 280974, 280975, 280976, 280977, 280978, 280979, 287546) and `status` = 'approved'
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-04-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 22:43:56'
select sum(`base_grand_total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-04-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 22:43:56'

select sum(`base_grand_total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-04-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 22:43:56' and `status` in ('completed', 'closed')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-05-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 23:59:59'
select sum(`base_grand_total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-05-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 23:59:59'

select sum(`base_grand_total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `created_at` between '2026-05-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 23:59:59' and `status` in ('completed', 'closed')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved'
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `status` in ('pending', 'pending_payment', 'processing')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `status` in ('completed', 'closed')
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved' and `status` = 'canceled'

select 
                oi.product_id,
                MAX(oi.name) as name,
                SUM(oi.base_total_invoiced - oi.base_amount_refunded) as revenue,
                SUM(oi.qty_invoiced - oi.qty_refunded) as qty_sold
             from `order_items` as `oi` inner join `orders` as `o` on `oi`.`order_id` = `o`.`id` where `o`.`seller_id` = 3 and `oi`.`parent_id` is null and `oi`.`created_at` between '2026-04-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 22:43:56' and `o`.`seller_approval_status` = 'approved' group by `oi`.`product_id` having SUM(oi.base_total_invoiced - oi.base_amount_refunded) > 0 order by `revenue` desc limit 10
select count(*) as aggregate from `orders` where `seller_id` = 3 and `seller_approval_status` = 'approved'
select * from `seller` where `id` = 3 limit 1
select * from `roles` where `roles`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select count(distinct `product_id`) as aggregate from `seller_store_products` where `seller_id` = 3
select `product_id` from `seller_store_products` where `seller_id` = 3

select column_name as `name`, data_type as `type_name`, column_type as `type`, collation_name as `collation`, is_nullable as `nullable`, column_default as `default`, column_comment as `comment`, generation_expression as `expression`, extra as `extra` from information_schema.columns where table_schema = 'shop' and table_name = 'orders' order by ordinal_position asc

select
oi.product_id,
MAX(oi.name) as name,
SUM(oi.base_total_invoiced - oi.base_amount_refunded) as revenue,
SUM(oi.qty_invoiced - oi.qty_refunded) as qty_sold
from `order_items` as `oi` inner join `orders` as `o` on `oi`.`order_id` = `o`.`id` where `o`.`seller_id` = 3 and `oi`.`parent_id` is null and `oi`.`created_at` between '2026-04-08 00:00:00' and '2026-05-08 22:43:56' and `o`.`seller_approval_status` = 'approved' group by `oi`.`product_id` having SUM(oi.base_total_invoiced - oi.base_amount_refunded) > 0 order by `revenue` desc limit 10
select * from `currencies` where `code` = 'USD'
select * from `locales` where `code` = 'en'
select * from `channels` where `hostname` in ('127.0.0.1:8000', 'http://127.0.0.1:8000', 'https://127.0.0.1:8000')
select * from `channels` limit 1
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.design.admin_logo.favicon'
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.content.custom_scripts.custom_css' and `channel_code` = 'default'
